sub_goals.description: mountRenderer with column-per-list, card-per-card, draggable+data attributes, add-list/add-card/delete-list/delete-card affordances.
sub_goals.verification_notes: S3.A1: one section.list per list, one .card per card. S3.A2: cards have draggable=true, data-card-id, data-list-id. S3.A3: subscribes to stateModel and re-renders. S3.A4: add-list affordance present even when lists empty. IP1.A3: no .card-description / detail trigger / expand. IP2.A1: list header has no draggable attribute.
